arts.ttl: Sources: Arsenal could now sign £15.5m Real Madrid attacker this month who Mikel Arteta has already coached
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively reveal that Real Madrid are considering moving on Arsenal target Brahim Diaz, although only one of Diaz, Ader Guler and Endrick...

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Las Palmas, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Las Palmas in La Liga. Just as expected, Alaba starts this game on the bench, so he will play his first minutes in over a year if Los Blancos manage to build a comfortable lead.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Aurélien Tchouaméni playing for Real Madrid vs Las Palmas today?
arts.sum: With Luka Modric suspended, Dani Ceballos appears to be in pole position to come into Madrid’s midfield for today’s matchday-20 LaLiga game, which kicks off at 10:15 a.m. ET. Aurélien Tchouaméni has dropped out of Real Madrid’s matchday squad for today’s LaLiga clash with Las Palmas, with the club explaining that the Frenchman is suffering from “discomfort in his left leg” .

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti responds to Real Madrid sack speculation with Hansi Flick comparison
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti's Real Madrid have endured an indifferent run of results but the same can be said for rival Hansi Flick at Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid dealt last-minute Tchouaméni injury blow, just hours before Las Palmas clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to host Las Palmas this afternoon at the Bernabéu in a fixture which could see them go top of the pile in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich raising Alphonso Davies’ contract offer in an effort to prevent Real Madrid from swooping in
arts.sum: In the fight to win Alphonso Davies’ signature, all cards are now on the table. Both Bayern Munich and Real Madrid have put their offers forward for the Canadian, and…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Las Palmas 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch LaLiga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Las Palmas in what is the first LaLiga game for Los Blancos since January 3rd. Las Palmas are fighting to avoid relegation, so this should be a fairly comfortable home game for Real Madrid if they take it seriously enough.

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Real Madrid vs. Eibar; Liga F 2025
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Chavas, Olga, Lakrar, Rocío, Antonia S., Teresa, Toletti, Linda C., Eva Navarro, Redondo, Møller With Linda and Eva Navarro on the wings, Redondo and Møller lead the line as the striker duo, while the Dane is more likely to drop to the #10 role in the 4-2-3-1 formation.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Vinícius Júnior playing for Real Madrid against Las Palmas today?
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without star forward Vinícius Júnior in today’s game against Las Palmas, as the Brazilian begins a two-game LaLiga ban for his sending-off against Valencia earlier this month . The Italian is expected to play Brahim on the right wing, where the Moroccan international was also a starter in Madrid’s midweek Copa del Rey win over Celta Vigo.

arts.ttl: Why Vinicius Junior Isn't Playing for Real Madrid vs. Las Palmas
arts.sum: Vinícius Júnior is unavailable to play against Las Palmas due to his two-match suspension for his red card against Valencia.
